About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for the development of basic education in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

For more information, please visit the official website of the Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department.

About the Programme

The UP Bijnor ECCE Educator Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment program for ECCE educators in the Bijnor district of Uttar Pradesh.

The program aims to provide quality education to children in the district and to promote the development of early childhood education.
